meaning: adj.鐖卞ソ闊充箰鐨刵.浜ゅ搷涔愬洟
examples: In a new recording, the Boston Philharmonic tried the original tempo.
The Lithuanian Philharmonic Orchestra played Beethoven's Ninth Symphony.
He will conduct the Los Angeles Philharmonic in the final concert of the season.
Little wonder his double bill with the New York Philharmonic was a celebration of Gershwin.
John Adams conducts the L.A. Philharmonic's New Music Group in a performance of Grand Pianola Music.
